visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient covers the entire landing hero section

visual-child-friendly.notes: Playful emoji icons, friendly AI buddy with suggestion chips, and large CTA buttons; builder has moderate UI complexity for young children

visual-consistency.notes: Main builder views are internally consistent, but save-after-reload shows a completely different layout, object set, and navigation structure; gallery also drifts in background color and card style

visual-accessibility.notes: Focus ring visible on selected objects, text labels accompany most icons, good contrast in builder/gallery; landing page white-on-gradient contrast is borderline and no responsive layout evidence
